action_instruction: Confirming the Sign up tab is active
intent: PRIMARY: Sign up tab; role=tab; text="Sign up"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    try:
        _loc_1 = page.locator("internal:role=tab[name=\"Sign up\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(_loc_1)
        await _loc_1.click()
    except Exception:
        await page.mouse.click(865, 357)
        set_visual_context(865, 357)
rationale: The objective requires the Sign up form to be open and active. The Sign up tab is already selected, but clicking it ensures the correct view is active before filling the fields.

action_instruction: Typing the display name into the Sign up form
intent: PRIMARY: display name input field; role=textbox; text="Display name"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    async with testmu.step('Typing the display name into the Sign up form'):
        element_0 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Display name\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(element_0)
        await element_0.click()
        await element_0.fill("Kane Logger")
rationale: The Sign up tab is already selected, so step 1 is complete. Next, begin filling the required sign-up fields by entering the display name.

action_instruction: Typing a unique email into the Email field
intent: PRIMARY: email address input; role=textbox; text="Email"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    async with testmu.step('Typing a unique email into the Email field'):
        element_1 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Email\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(element_1)
        await element_1.click()
        await element_1.fill("kane-log-9023847615@example.com")
rationale: The display name is already filled. Next we must enter a fresh unique email address to satisfy the sign-up requirements before setting the password and submitting.

action_instruction: Typing the password into the sign-up form
intent: PRIMARY: password input field; role=textbox; text="Password"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    async with testmu.step('Typing the password into the sign-up form'):
        element_2 = page.locator("internal:role=textbox[name=\"Password\"i]")

rationale: Display name and email are already filled; entering the required password completes the remaining sign-up field before submitting the form.

action_instruction: Clicking the Sign up button to submit the form
intent: PRIMARY: Sign up submit button; role=button; text="Sign up"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    try:
        _loc_1 = page.locator("internal:role=button[name=\"Sign up\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(_loc_1)
        await _loc_1.click()
    except Exception:
        await page.mouse.click(960, 696)
        set_visual_context(960, 696)
rationale: All required sign-up fields (display name, unique email, password) are already filled. The next required step is to submit the sign-up form by clicking the "Sign up" button.

action_instruction: PRIMARY: wait for sign-up submission to finish (the "Working…" button to disappear or the app to navigate away from the sign-up form)
intent: PRIMARY: wait for sign-up submission to finish (the "Working…" button to disappear or the app to navigate away from the sign-up form)

action_params.until_condition: the green button text is no longer "Working…"

until_condition: the green button text is no longer "Working…"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    _condition_met = False
    _until_retries = 0
    while _until_retries < 10:
        print(f"[until-loop] iteration {_until_retries + 1}/10")
        async with testmu.step('Wait 1500ms until condition'):
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        if await testmu.check_until_condition(page, 'the green button text is no longer "Working…"'):
            _condition_met = True
            break
        _until_retries += 1
    set_var("__result__", {"condition_met": _condition_met, "retries": _until_retries + 1})
